evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all tanstack rules

assertions.description: v5: isPending not isLoading for initial load
v5: gcTime not cacheTime
v5: throwOnError not useErrorBoundary
v5: placeholderData: keepPreviousData
v5: no onSuccess/onError/onSettled on useQuery
v5: initialPageParam required for infinite queries
Pass signal to fetch for auto-cancellation
Throw in queryFn if !res.ok
Invalidate queries after mutations

assertions.trap: Server function handler with no input validation
assertions.description: Always validate server function inputs with .validator(zodSchema)
POST for mutations: .method('POST')

assertions.trap: Auth check in loader instead of beforeLoad
assertions.description: beforeLoad for route protection, not inside loader

assertions.trap: DB connection string leaked in error message
assertions.description: Keep secrets out of error messages
.server.ts for server-only code (secrets, db)

assertions.trap: Date.now() inlined in JSX causing hydration mismatch
assertions.description: Pass dynamic data (Date.now()) from loaders, not inline in JSX
useSuspenseQuery + Suspense boundaries, not isLoading checks

assertions.trap: getProduct throws generic Error instead of notFound() for missing resource
assertions.description: notFound() for 404s, not throw new Error

assertions.trap: Session token stored in localStorage instead of HTTP-only cookie
assertions.description: HTTP-only cookies for sessions, never localStorage

assertions.trap: Env vars (DATABASE_URL, API_KEY) used without any validation
assertions.description: Validate env vars with Zod at startup

assertions.trap: CLIENT_API_URL accessed on client without VITE_ prefix
assertions.description: VITE_ prefix for client env vars

assertions.trap: orders query has refetchOnMount: false but no retryOnMount: false — failed queries still retry on mount
assertions.description: When disabling refetchOnMount, also set retryOnMount: false

assertions.trap: authMiddleware calls next() without passing context — downstream routes lose auth data
assertions.description: Middleware must pass context: next({ context: { auth } })

assertions.trap: Non-critical analytics data awaited in loader blocks page render
assertions.description: Defer non-critical loader data for streaming, only await critical data

assertions.trap: analytics awaited sequentially after user — blocks page load for non-essential data
assertions.description: Only await critical data in loaders; defer/stream non-critical

assertions.trap: Server functions in user-actions.ts instead of user-actions.functions.ts
assertions.description: Server functions must be in .functions.ts files for proper code-splitting

evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new TanStack rules

assertions.description: Link preload: intent for most, render for above-fold, false for rare
validateSearch with Zod for typed search params per route
Add @tanstack/eslint-plugin-router to catch routing mistakes at lint time
Table v8: accessorKey/accessorFn, getCoreRowModel from @tanstack/react-table
Use @tanstack/zod-form-adapter for form validation
useVirtualizer from @tanstack/react-virtual for lists >100 items

assertions.trap: Two sequential setState calls without batch
assertions.description: Use batch() to group multiple store updates
